bug.description: incorrect loop bounds causing iteration over invalid indices

prompt:
There is a incorrect loop bounds causing iteration over invalid indices downstream of function init_modulation_LUT_qam16_tm2_p2 in the openair1/PHY/LTE_TRANSPORT subsystem.
The function is located at openair1/PHY/LTE_TRANSPORT/dlsch_modulation.c:3108.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
